title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 26–28, this part focuses on Unknown person #23, Beast Pirates, Basil Hawkins, Holdem, Unknown person #24, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's almost like this kid- napping was planned out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should be heading towards the government official district.

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: There are three headliners that reside there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of that, there are around 30 people there who have gained abilities from some kind of mysterious artificial fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've captured the girl who tamed the baboon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We're heading straight into the Bakura district.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the government officials' and the Pirates' territory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: are heading to the Bakura district!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: There's no way he won't cause trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: WE HAVE TO GO STOP THOSE [DIOTS!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
